case_title: ROBERT GIBSON CABRERA VS. ERNEST HOWARD MATLOCK et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-03-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ERNEST HOWARD MATLOCK'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF ROBERT GIBSON CABRERA TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS FOR INSPECTION AS DESCRIBED IN A DEPOSITION NOTICE AND FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF AND/OR HIS ATTORNEY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF(S), ROBERT GIBSON CABRERA IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT(S), ERNEST HOWARD MATLOCK. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT PURSUANT TO THE AWARD FILED ON NOV-29-2011 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
